item.title: Sensex Plunges Over 3% as Market Breadth Collapses; Mid and Small Caps Bear Brunt
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a sharp sell-off on 19 Mar 2026, with the Sensex tumbling 3.38% to close at 74,112.57, marking a loss of 2,591.56 points. The Nifty followed suit, dragged down by widespread sectoral weakness and a dismal advance-decline ratio, reflecting a broad-based market retreat. Small and midcap indices also suffered notable declines, signalling investor caution amid persistent negative sentiment. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Downturn Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 2.64% on the day and registering a 0.73% fall over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness is underscored by a severely negative advance-decline ratio, signalling widespread selling pressure across the segment. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as BSE MIDCAP 150 Declines 3.28%
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index has experienced a notable decline, falling by 3.28% on the day and registering a 0.9% drop over the past five sessions. Despite this recent weakness, the mid-cap segment continues to display pockets of resilience, with select stocks outperforming amid broad market pressures. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Decline Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 3.38% recently and shedding 0.88% over the past five days. This broad-based weakness is underscored by a stark advance-decline ratio, with only one stock advancing against 99 decliners, signalling widespread selling pressure across heavyweight constituents. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Stove Kraft Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.36% Surge on 19 Mar 2026
item.description: Stove Kraft Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 19 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 525.75, marking a 7.4% gain despite a broadly declining market. The stock outperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting notable trading momentum within the Electronics & Appliances segment. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Ashok Leyland Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 19 Mar 2026
item.description: Ashok Leyland Ltd. experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 169.6, reflecting a 5.07% drop as the stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid persistent downward pressures. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Canara Bank Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 19 Mar 2026
item.description: Canara Bank’s shares declined sharply on 19 Mar 2026, touching an intraday low of Rs 133, reflecting persistent price pressure amid a broadly negative market environment and sectoral weakness. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Euro Pratik Sales Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Euro Pratik Sales Ltd, a player in the Furniture and Home Furnishing sector, has recorded a new 52-week low of Rs.209.85, marking a significant decline amid broader market weakness and sectoral underperformance. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Highway Infrastructure Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Highway Infrastructure Ltd’s stock price declined sharply to a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.48.06 on 19 Mar 2026, marking a significant drop of 4.98% intraday and underperforming its sector by 1.5%. This movement comes amid a broader downturn in the construction sector and a weakening market environment. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Global Health Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Global Health Ltd’s stock declined sharply to a new 52-week low of Rs.1012.95 today, marking a significant downturn amid broader sector weakness and market pressures. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting ongoing valuation concerns and subdued momentum. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Gateway Distriparks Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Gateway Distriparks Ltd, a key player in the transport services sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.51.4 on 19 Mar 2026, marking a significant decline amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures. The stock underperformed its sector and the benchmark indices, reflecting ongoing challenges in maintaining upward momentum. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Bodhi Tree Multimedia Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Bodhi Tree Multimedia Ltd’s stock declined to a fresh 52-week and all-time low of Rs.6.43 on 19 Mar 2026, marking a significant drop amid broader market weakness. The stock has underperformed its sector and benchmark indices, reflecting ongoing concerns about its financial metrics and market positioning. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Patil Automation Ltd Stock Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Patil Automation Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Industrial Products sector, has recorded a new all-time low, closing just 0.22% above its 52-week low of ₹134. The stock’s recent performance reflects a sustained downward trajectory, with significant underperformance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Stovec Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.1629 Amid Continued Underperformance
item.description: Stovec Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the industrial manufacturing sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.1629 today, marking a significant decline amid ongoing challenges reflected in its financial and technical indicators. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: 63 Moons Technologies Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.538
item.description: Shares of 63 Moons Technologies Ltd touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.538 on 19 Mar 2026, marking a significant decline amid broader market weakness and sectoral underperformance. The stock’s fall comes after a brief two-day rally, reflecting ongoing pressures within the Computers - Software & Consulting sector. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Sanofi India Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Underperformance
item.description: Sanofi India Ltd’s share price has declined to a new 52-week low, closing just 0.06% above the lowest price of Rs 3,415.8. This marks a significant downturn for the pharmaceutical company, reflecting ongoing challenges in its financial performance and market positioning over the past year. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Kiduja India Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Kiduja India Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.13.73 today, marking a significant decline amid a sustained negative trend. The stock has underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting ongoing pressures on its valuation and fundamentals. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: GHCL Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.442.05 Amid Sector Downturn
item.description: Shares of GHCL Ltd, a player in the Commodity Chemicals sector, declined sharply to hit a new 52-week low of Rs.442.05 today, reflecting ongoing pressures within the company and the broader chemicals industry. The stock’s fall comes amid a negative market environment and subdued financial performance over recent periods. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Hittco Tools Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.8.8 Amidst Weak Fundamentals
item.description: Hittco Tools Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Industrial Manufacturing sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.8.8 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Escorts Kubota Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Escorts Kubota Ltd’s shares declined sharply to hit a new 52-week low of Rs.2908 on 19 Mar 2026, marking a significant downturn amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market, reflecting ongoing valuation concerns and subdued price momentum. Time: 31 minutes ago
